types.name: Carbon Film Resistor
types.description: Made by depositing a carbon film on a ceramic substrate. Most common general-purpose resistor.

types.name: Metal Film Resistor
types.description: Uses a thin metal film for the resistive element. Better tolerance and lower noise.

types.name: Wire-Wound Resistor
types.description: A wire made of resistive alloy is wound around a ceramic core. Handles high power.

types.name: Surface Mount (SMD) Resistor
types.description: Designed for surface-mount technology. Compact and suitable for automated assembly.

types.name: Variable Resistor (Potentiometer)
types.description: Adjustable resistance with three terminals. Used for volume controls and tuning.
